ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor from which the data was collected */,
  "date_stamp" INTEGER /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Time when the data was recorded */,
  "mini_volts" REAL /* Voltage reading from the sensor */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading from the sensor */,
  "irradiance" REAL /* Irradiance level recorded by the sensor */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level recorded by the sensor */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure recorded by the sensor */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor readings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., Voltage, Temperature, Irradiance) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data record being assessed */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data is valid */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Code for any error detected */,
  "error_description" TEXT /* Description of the error if applicable */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, external API) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data quality assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data that was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "measurement_range" TEXT /* Range of measurements the sensor can handle */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the sensor measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the status record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being monitored */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., operational, maintenance required) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date when the status was last checked */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the sensor */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that received maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Person who performed the maintenance */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* Parts that were replaced during maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the upload */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date of the data upload */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the uploaded file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the uploaded file in MB */,
  "upload_status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Voltage Too High, Temperature Too Low) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "acknowledged_by" TEXT /* Person who acknowledged the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_settings" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the setting applies */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alerts the user wants to receive notifications for */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if notifications are enabled */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_overview" (
  "overview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overview entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor for which the overview is generated */,
  "total_readings" INTEGER /* Total number of readings collected from the sensor */,
  "avg_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature from the sensor readings */,
  "avg_irradiance" REAL /* Average irradiance from the sensor readings */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum temperature observed */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum temperature observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("overview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_overview_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
